info.english_meaning: to cut to break to divide

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'uttame vayasi sarva eva (dantAH) praBidyante' (Sa॰brA॰11.4.1.5) SIyante BraSyanti prapatantItyAha
'na tvAM praBinnaM jAnAmi kimidaM BaratarzaBa' (BA॰mO॰8.6) praBinnaM parAjitam
'CinnA BinnAH praBinnA vA' (rA॰5.26.10) BinnA Bittivat praBinnA Gawavat SakalIkftA ityarTaH
praBinno gajito mattaH (gajaH) ityamaraH
'praBinnamiva mAtaNgaM parikIrRaM kareRuBiH' (BA॰vi॰19.29)
'tato mahAmeGamahIDarABaM praBinnamatyaNkuSamatyasahyam' (rA॰2.15.46) ukto'rTaH
'praBinnanaranArIkaH samAjotsavaSoBitaH' (rA02.100.44) praBedaH santoza iti tilakaH prahfzwanaranArIka iti kvacit pAWaH
'yaTA vE lANgalenorvarAM praBindanti' (tE0 saM0 66729) praBindanti prakarzeRa kfzanti
'tasya pArAvatAnaSvAn raTaSaktyA parABinat' (BA॰droRa॰191.32) atyantaM vikzatAnakarot kzuRRAnakArzIdityarTaH
'parABinannavErnavatyA ca SarEstaTArjunam' (BA॰karRa॰90.60) ukto'rTaH
'parABinatkrOYcamivAdrimagnijaH' (BA॰karRa॰90.68) vyadArayadityarTaH
'BindDi viSvA apa dvizaH' (f॰8.45.40) BittvA'paDvaMsayetyarTaH
'na hi sA tena samBedaM patnI nItA mahAtmanA' (BA॰SAM॰266.62)
'svAdaH kAvyArTasamBedAdAtmAnandasamudBavaH' (sA॰da॰tftIye pari॰) samBedaH=sparSaH
'anAdikarmakleSavAsanAviSayapratyupasTitavizayajAlA cASudDirnAntareRa nfpaH samBedamApadyate' (yo॰sU॰2.1 BAzye) samBedo vinASaH
'ya evaM manuzyaH samBinnabudDirBavati sa paSyati nedaM kiYcid Darmo nAma nEnaM karizyAmIti' (yogaBAzye) samBinnabudDiH puRyApuRyayoH sammiSritabudDirnAstikaH
'yadvA urvarayorasamBinnaM Bavati Kilamiti vE tadAcakzate' (kO॰a॰30.8) urvarAByAM BUBAgAByAmasaMyuktam (asambadDam) ityAha
'taTA samBinnasarvANgakUrmaM sTala ivodDftam' (BA॰vi॰23.2) samBinnasarvANgam=saMlInasakalagAtram pratisaMhftasarvAvayavam anyonyasamBinnadfSAM saKInAm parasparaM saMsfzwanetrARAmityarTaH
'dvipAH samBinnavarmARo vajrAganisamEH SarEH' (BA॰karRa॰19.13) samBinnAni BinnAni vidIrRAni varmARi yezAM te atra samSabdo'rTAntaraM na karoti
'asamBinnAryamaryAdaH paRqitAKyAM laBeta saH' (BA॰u॰33.29) ihApi pUrvavat
'asamBinnAryamaryAdAH sADavaH puruzottamAH' (BA॰ASrama॰12.2)
'tIkzRA samBinnamaryAdA tIkzRAkarmaRi vartate' (rA॰2.49.5)
'asamBindan mAMsasaMhitAByAmaNguzWena ca puroqASasyAvadyati' (Apa॰SrO॰2.6.18.11)
'yaTA dvayoravadAnayorasaNgamaH syAttaTA'vadyati' (BA॰) avadAnadeSAvasaNkiranniti rudradattaH
'na saMBinati' (tE0 saM0 621157) na saMBinati nEkIkaroti
'yanna duHKena saMBinnaM na ca grastamanantaram aBilAzopanItaM ca tatsuKaM svaH padAspadam..' saMBinnaM vyAmiSram sampfktam idaMlakzaRaM hi suKamizwaM yAjYikAnAm
'aNgAnAM samBedaH' (suSruta0 ni0 a0 5) saMBedo BaNgaH
'saBedaKedajananI dyunadI lasacCrIH' (skandapu0 kA0 43081) samyagBedaH sa BedaH tasya KedaH pratiGAto nASaH
'sa (viSvAmitraH)…vipAw CatudryoH saMBedamAyayO' (ni0 224) samBedaH sinDusaNgrAma ityamaraH
'purA saMBedAcCAyAnAmAhavanIyamudDaret' (E0 brA0 711) sa Bedo miSraRaM vyatikaraH
'aTEnaM CinnaDanvAnaM… nirbiBeda raRe rAjA' (BA0 BIzma0 8415) garhitaM vivyADa
'yaTA'SvatTa niraBinontarmahatyarRave' (aTarva0 363) nirBidyotpannosItyAha akarmako'tra BidiravivakzitakarmA
'tasyABitaptasya muKaM niraBidyata' (E0 A0 241) vyadIryatetyarTaH saMvftaM vivftamaBUt
'pfTivyAScApi nirBedo dfzwa eva sanAtanaH' (rA0 1404) nirBedaH saMhAraH
'vizRurmaDunihantA ca cakAra maDuvAhinIm nadIM prasravanirBedAm' (hari0 12017) nirBedo nirdaraH
'nirBedAdftepi mAlavikAyAmayamupanyAsaH SaNkayati' (mAla0 4) nirBedo vispazwaM kIrtanam
'viBinnavarRA garuqAgrajena sUryasya raTyAH paritaH sPUrantyA' (SiSu0 414) viBinnavarRA vicitravarRAH samBinnarAgAH

'prajApateH prARezUtkrAntezu SarIraM SvayitumaDriyata tasya yaH SlezmAsItsa sArDaM samavadrutya maDyato nasta udaBinat sa eza vanaspatiraBavat' (Sa0 brA0 13446) udaBinat=udaBidyata=aNkurito'Bavat aNkuro'BinavodBidi (amaraH)
'saMsvedajA aRqajA udBidaSca' (BA0 Adi0 8911)
'semaM naH kArumupamanyumudBidamindraH kfRotu prasave raTaM puraH' (f0 11029) udBidamantaHpraveSaSIlaM vijetAramaBiBavitAram
'ye (devAH) asmaByaM GanadA udBidaSca' (f0 101169) uktorTaH kisalayodBedaH=navapallavodgamaH
'ratyantasulaBodBedErniHsftEH svedabinduBiH' (rAja0 5382) ukto'rTaH
'svapnakIrtitavipakzamaNganAH pratyaBEtsuravadantya eva tam' (raGu0 1922) pratyaBEtsuH praticakruH tiraScakruH
'pratiBidya kAntamaparADakftam' (SiSu0 958) pratiBidya=aDikzipya=apodya=garhitvA=ninditvA nirAkftyeti vA
'dUrvApravAlEH pratiBinnaSoBam' (ku0 77) viSezitaSoBam upacitaSoBam ityarTaH
'candreRa pratiBinnamOleH' (ku0 735) saNgatamukuwasya samarTe pratiH
